title: Knowledge Base
subtitle: Manage document collections for agent RAG

empty.title: No collections yet
empty.text: Collections let you organize documents into knowledge bases that agents can search using RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation). Create a collection above to get started.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Collection
deleteDialog.message: Delete collection "{{name}}"? This will remove all entries and cannot be undone.

resetDialog.title: Reset Collection
resetDialog.message: Reset collection "{{name}}"? This will remove all entries but keep the collection.
